segment.source: Renders a card grid introduced by eyebrow and heading, each card carrying a type badge such as Guide or Whitepaper, a title, a short rich-text description and an open-resource link. Use it for: download and link collections - whitepapers, guides, ebooks, templates or documentation hubs listed in a source document. Prefer 'File Download List' when items are attached files with size and download button; 'Article Grid' for editorial posts.
